title: Retro's Discs
description: Retextures music discs to be more better
body:
Retextures all of the music discs (as of 1.21.7) to be in an updated style. With a much more dynamic perspective of the item itself and shading to make it look much more like a record disc. (Also, the little color thingy in the center is larger in proportion to the disc, to show that it's a shorter track than a full album.)

This pack *should* work for all versions.

The original C418 tracks:
![retextured c418 discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4937874b6662545941c2aeabf5b76338cf15f18.png)

The newer tracks by Lena Raine, Samuel Åberg, Aaron Cherof, Amos Roddy, and Hyper Potions
![retextured newer discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f29c953f1550c8fca722315e8378a23be6f79a4.png)
